description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a rectangular, boxy design and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in dark blue vertical panels, contrasted by large, white-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front features a covered entryway, a driveway with a parked car, and a small porch area. The property includes outdoor seating and a large, stylized tree with geometric foliage, adding a contemporary touch to the landscape. The rear of the house has a rooftop terrace and additional outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic typical of modern urban homes.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with dark blue paneling, large windows, and a flat roof, featuring a driveway, porch, and geometric landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with a car, porch, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical blue paneling, the carport, and the geometric tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop terrace, large geometric tree, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Back view with symmetrical window arrangement, outdoor furniture, and clear view of the flat roof and terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and adjacent porch area
